nasb.text: on one day in all the provinces of King Ahasuerus, the thirteenth day of the twelfth month (that is, the month Adar).

esv.text: on one day throughout all the provinces of King Ahasuerus, on the thirteenth day of the twelfth month, which is the month of Adar.

cnv.text: 一日之間，在十二月，就是亞達月，十三日，在亞哈隨魯王的各省，開始實行。
